entries.description: Upgraded ai_router/prompt-templates/verification.md from weak ('evaluate it objectively') to the strong devil's-advocate framing pull uses, preserving the build_verification_prompt/parse_verification_response machine contract (placeholders + VERIFIED/ISSUES FOUND + Issue/Category/Severity). Added test_verification_framing.py pinning the strong framing (so a future silent weakening is caught) and the machine contract.

Shipped the start_session contractGate-seed fix (--contract-gate flag + _capture_contract_gate, mirroring _capture_path_aware_critique, delegating to the existing contract_gate.resolve_and_record_contract_gate; best-effort fail-open). Recorded this set's durable contractGate:advisory seed at set start (closing the Set 069 S6 gap). Added 5 capture tests to test_start_session.py.

Built ai_router/dual_surface_verify.py: run_dual_surface drives the PUSH arm (snippet-fed single-shot over the committed diff under verification.md) and the PULL arm (pull_route repo-reading agentic loop under path-aware-critique.md) over the same committed state, provider+model+framing held EQUAL. Framing is classified from each arm's SINGLE-source raw template body (pull instruction rendered from the same pull_template via build_instruction(template_text=...)); provider/model equality DERIVED from each arm's actual reported identity; refuses unequal (UnequalArmsError) — framing pre-arm, provider/model post-arm. NO merge (S2). Both arms injectable; no metered call at import. 20 hermetic tests in test_dual_surface_verify.py.

Full ai_router suite GREEN: 1988 passed, 5 skipped (the 5 are Set 069 S4 real-Podman-on-Windows by-design skips). Cross-provider verification (gpt-5-4, routed_gate REQUIRED via blast-radius+breadth): R1 ISSUES_FOUND (3: hard-coded providerEqual/modelEqual; pull framing classified from rendered instruction=spoofable; committed_ref misstated provenance) -> all fixed; R2 (3 resolved, 1 NEW: pull_template/pull_instruction drift) -> fixed via pairing guard; R3 (devil's advocate: even paired, 2 inputs can diverge) -> fixed via SINGLE source of truth (removed pull_instruction param; instruction rendered from pull_template); R4 VERIFIED. Next-session orchestrator recommendation routed (gemini-pro): claude/sonnet-4-6/medium.

Built provenance merge (merge_findings/MergedFinding/MergeResult): stable defectKey only, never free-text; unkeyed never merged (safe over-split); provenanceComplete flag + per-surface unkeyed counts.

Built comparison artifact (build/validate_comparison_artifact + dual-surface-comparison.schema.json + example): L-066-1 parity, closed envelope, int-not-bool, cross-field provenance invariants the schema cannot express.

Built scoring: score_comparison (push/pull/shared high-sev tallies + upper-bound flag), score_against_benchmark (ground-truth RETIRE telemetry over Set 069 registration, underpowered->inconclusive), aggregate_retire_telemetry (refuses to pool sampled+opt-in).

Wired dualSurfaceMode verificationMode-pattern option (activity-log record once-at-set-start+immutable, read/has/unreadable/spec-seed, should_run_dual_surface injected-draw sampled/opt-in trigger) + CLI record-mode/read-mode/score.

Cross-provider verification (gpt-5-4, routed_gate REQUIRED): R1 ISSUES x3 (provenanceComplete/count honesty; record-mode malformed-log crash; test adequacy)->fixed; R2 ISSUES x2 (L-069-1 incomplete class-fix: readers+stepNumber still TypeError on non-list entries)->hardened all readers; R3 VERIFIED. Full ai_router suite GREEN 2063/5. Lessons cited L-066-1/L-069-1/L-064-10/L-064-9/L-064-3. Deferred residual recorded: same non-list-entries pattern in path_aware_critique.py + dedicated_verification.py siblings. No release (S3).
